info.title: FreeSql quickly generates entity classes from database
info.description: 使用 FreeSql 快速生成数据库的实体类，安装：dotnet tool install -g FreeSql.Generator

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Update tool: dotnet tool update -g FreeSql.Generator

options.name: -Razor
options.description: * Custom template file, if garbled please modify to UTF8 (without BOM) encoding format

options.name: -NameOptions
options.description:
* 4 boolean values correspond to:
First letter uppercase
First letter uppercase, others lowercase
All lowercase
Underscore to camelCase
